sentences.text: I didn't want to cancel again.
This is no big deal at all.
I was gonna say, yeah, whatever makes sense for you like, I'll always be here.
We need to move this around.
Well, here's what I want to do.
I wanted to just get a update on what?
That you're providing the service you're providing.
I want to make sure I'm not double
Double dipping, like I have another company to do some that's doing some social marketing for us.
And you know their SEO, their pretty active.
And they're at one of other properties.
I know you're you're you're on other side of Google.
on on Google's ratings and and.
And profiles, and kind of communicating that way.
Do you track any kind of results from that.
Which is why I'm curious if it makes sense for us to reschedule.
Metrics cause what we're seeing is like, pretty fantastic.
What social company are you using?
I know that Pete was using him in Denver.
I remember you mentioning that you were looking at.
So yeah, so I want to kind of get an idea what we're, you know.
Make sure we're not duplicating the services, you know.
Is there a better time for us to reschedule.
Yeah, let's yeah, this is a busy week.
This is this is the week that we actually send.
We actually send all of our employees to Cedar Point and their families for employee Appreciation Day.
So we have to all go there and we're preparing for it right now.

So and we're in a car driving there to be meeting some of our senior point executives to kind of the finalize some of the arrangements, because we give them a lot of little swag bag and that kind of stuff, you know.
I know it's where your offices are at like back there.
I will update the calendar invite.
I hope you guys have fun.
